metadata.description: DevExpress XAF (eXpressApp Framework) skill set for AI agents and developers. 18 reference skill files covering XPO, EF Core, Controllers, Security, Web API, Reports, Dashboards, Office modules, Blazor, WinForms, Multi-tenancy, Validation, Conditional Appearance, and Deployment.

plugins.name: xaf-devexpress
plugins.description: Complete DevExpress XAF reference skill set: EF Core & XPO models, Controllers & Actions, Security, Web API (OData), Reports, Dashboards, Office modules, Blazor UI, WinForms UI, Multi-tenancy, Validation, Conditional Appearance, Deployment. v24.2 and v25.1.
